item.title: Bull Shark The Violent 'Bump and Bite' Explained
item.description: This is the hidden mechanics behind the Bull Shark’s violent 'Bump and Bite' attack. While most sharks test their prey with a gentle nudge, the Bull Shark—one of the ocean’s most unpredictable predators—uses this signature aggression to determine if you’re a threat or a meal.In this deep dive, we break down: Why the 'Bump and Bite' is a biological weapon, not just a behavior. The science behind Bull Shark territorial aggression. How to react if you encounter the ocean's most dangerous shark in murky water. Research indicates that Bull Shark attacks are rarely simple accidents. We’re analyzing the biological drivers that make this specific species a 'nightmare fuel' encounter for swimmers and divers alike.#BullShark #DeepSea #OceanMysteries #SharkScience #NatureDocumentary #PredatorBehavior
